mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ds_exchange_code WHERE code = #{code} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM ds_exchange_code WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT * FROM ds_exchange_code
AND (code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR batch_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR coupon_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE ds_exchange_code SET status = 'USED', used_by = #{usedBy}, used_at = #{usedAt}, update_time = NOW() WHERE code = #{code} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
